biography: Jarkko, affectionately known as "Bailando" among his peers for his rhythmic prowess on the green, is a familiar face at the Hector Trophée, representing the esteemed Hirsala Golf club.

With nine past appearances at the tournament, Jarkko brings a wealth of experience to the competition. His dedication and skill have not gone unrewarded, as he has clinched the coveted Hector Trophée once, in addition to one Victor Trophy to his name.
Known for his meticulous approach to the game, Jarkko leaves no stone unturned in his pursuit of excellence. Spectators can anticipate his tenth appearance at the Hector Trophée in 2026.
